name: tutorial-selection-review
title: Selection Review
description: Fetch a list of options via script, then let a human pick one from the results. Demonstrates the selection review pattern: a script outputs an options array, a review step with selection: 1 presents them for picking, and verdicts route the choice.

steps.name: Fetch Available Templates
steps.description: Fetch a list of templates for the user to choose from.

steps.name: Pick a Template
steps.description: Select one template from the fetched options.

steps.name: Generate Document
steps.description: Generate a document skeleton from the selected template.
